title: Anti-gravity unit
content:
{{Top|leg}}
An '''anti-gravity unit''' was a vehicle-mounted device used for loading and unloading of heavy cargo. [[Anti-grav loader]]s were known to be equipped with them. The unit worked by shooting an anti-gravity beam at heavy objects, apparently making them weightless, and then guiding them to their desired destination. It could apparently be used as a combat countermeasure as well, as [[Kirk Windjammer]] once used his anti-grav unit to deflect an incoming [[photon missile]].

{{Tech-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Droids (1986) 5|''Droids'' (1986) 5]]
